Blockchain VC Funding.summary: CZ's YZi Labs has initiated a $1 billion builder fund aimed at fostering growth and innovation within the rapidly expanding BNB Chain ecosystem. This substantial investment signifies a major push to attract and support new projects.

Blockchain VC Funding.summary: Nasdaq and Citi, alongside Novogratz's firm, have invested in Symbiont, a blockchain company focused on institutional applications. This collaborative funding highlights growing traditional finance interest in enterprise blockchain solutions.

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Homeland Security Funding Blockchain Technology via SBIRs
Blockchain VC Funding.summary: The Department of Homeland Security is actively funding blockchain technology projects through its Small Business Innovation Research (SBIR) programs. This initiative demonstrates government interest in leveraging blockchain for national security applications.

Blockchain VC Funding.summary: Indian banks are set to introduce a new blockchain-based funding system for Small and Medium-sized Enterprises (SMEs) to mitigate the risk of loan defaults. This innovative approach aims to enhance transparency and security in lending.
